body: Trane Home connected to Google Home. Can now set the thermostat from Google Home. Year-long project.
I successfully negotiated the plumber on the flange repair on the master toilet. He had came out a second time. He normally charges $250, and he did the second half of that task for $175.
Got Tax Appraisal at $469,000 when I would have accepted the $475,000 that was in the appraisal.
At some point in the last 9 days (as of this entry), I got the plastic bag off of generator 6. This is a bag that was wrapped around the left wheel of generator 6.
